name: Vegetable Miso Soup
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Fresh peas, shelled, OR 3 cups (thawed) Frozen peas
3 Green onions, with tops – thinly sliced
1 Jalapeno pepper, seeded – sliced into thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 1 cup of water with the miso and stir until well mixed.
2. In a large pot, bring remaining 5 cups water to a boil. Add peas, green onions, jalapeno pepper, and garlic; simmer for about 3 minutes.
3. Stir in the miso mixture, dulse, lemon juice, and hot sesame oil. Bring just to a simmer over medium-high heat.
4. Serve immediately.
